meta.summary: Phylogenetic orthology inference for comparative genomics, including orthogroups, gene trees, species trees, gene duplications, orthologues, and comparative genomics statistics.
meta.description: Phylogenetic orthology inference for comparative genomics, including orthogroups, gene trees, species trees, gene duplications, orthologues, and comparative genomics statistics.

test: orthofinder --version 2>&1 | python -c 'import re, sys; text = re.sub(chr(27) + r"\[[0-9;]*m", "", sys.stdin.read()); assert "OrthoFinder:v3.1.5" in text, text'
orthofinder --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'SIMPLE USAGE:' >/dev/null && orthofinder --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'orthofinder [options] -f <dir>' >/dev/null
python -c 'import orthofinder; print(orthofinder.__version__)' | grep -Fx '3.1.5' >/dev/null
diamond version | grep -Fx 'diamond version 2.1.25' >/dev/null
famsa -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 2.5.2-' >/dev/null
muscle -version 2>&1 | sed -n '1p' | grep -Fx 'muscle 5.3.linux64 [v5.3-taffish-r1]' >/dev/null
fastme --version | grep -Fx 'FastME 2.1.6.3' >/dev/null
astral-pro -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version: v1.25.3.8' >/dev/null
FastTree 2>&1 | grep -F 'FastTree Version 2.1.11' >/dev/null && mcl -h >/dev/null && makeblastdb -help >/dev/null && mmseqs version >/dev/null
orthofinder-utils --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'OrthoFinder utility scripts' >/dev/null && primary_transcript --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Create primary transcript FASTA files' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-orthofinder-primary && cd /tmp/taf-orthofinder-primary && printf '>gene1.t1
MAAA
>gene1.t2
MAAAAA
>gene2.t1
MCC
' > transcripts.fa && primary_transcript transcripts.fa last_dot >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-primary.log 2>&1 && test -s primary_transcripts/transcripts.fa && grep -F '>gene1.t2' primary_transcripts/transcripts.fa >/dev/null && grep -F '>gene2.t1' primary_transcripts/transcripts.fa >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-orthofinder-diamond && cd /tmp/taf-orthofinder-diamond && printf '>a
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>b
GILGFVFTLTVPSERKELKQLLQK
' > proteins.fa && diamond makedb --in proteins.fa -d proteins >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-diamond-makedb.log 2>&1 && diamond blastp -d proteins -q proteins.fa -o hits.tsv --quiet --max-target-seqs 1 -p 1 >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-diamond-search.log 2>&1 && test -s hits.tsv && grep -F 'a' hits.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-orthofinder-backends && cd /tmp/taf-orthofinder-backends && printf '>a
MKTAYIAK
>b
MKTAYIG
' > aln.fa && famsa aln.fa famsa.fa -t 1 >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-famsa.log 2>&1 && test -s famsa.fa && muscle -align aln.fa -output muscle.fa >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-muscle.log 2>&1 && test -s muscle.fa && FastTree famsa.fa > tree.nwk 2>/tmp/taf-orthofinder-fasttree.log && test -s tree.nwk && printf '4
A 0 0.1 0.2 0.3
B 0.1 0 0.2 0.3
C 0.2 0.2 0 0.1
D 0.3 0.3 0.1 0
' > dist.phy && fastme -i dist.phy -o fastme.nwk >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-fastme.log 2>&1 && test -s fastme.nwk

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-orthofinder-run && cd /tmp/taf-orthofinder-run && cp -r /usr/local/share/doc/orthofinder/tests/data/proteome/Core proteomes && orthofinder -f proteomes -t 1 -a 1 -o results >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-run.log 2>&1 && test -s results/Results_*/Orthogroups/Orthogroups.tsv && test -s results/Results_*/Species_Tree/SpeciesTree_rooted.txt && grep -F 'BIG_A_1' results/Results_*/Orthogroups/Orthogroups.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-orthofinder-dendroblast && cd /tmp/taf-orthofinder-dendroblast && cp -r /usr/local/share/doc/orthofinder/tests/data/proteome/Core proteomes && orthofinder -f proteomes -M dendroblast -t 1 -a 1 -o results >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-dendroblast.log 2>&1 && test -s results/Results_*/Orthogroups/Orthogroups.tsv && test -s results/Results_*/Species_Tree/SpeciesTree_rooted.txt

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-orthofinder-muscle-run && cd /tmp/taf-orthofinder-muscle-run && cp -r /usr/local/share/doc/orthofinder/tests/data/proteome/Core proteomes && orthofinder -f proteomes -M msa -A muscle -T fasttree -t 1 -a 1 -o results >/tmp/taf-orthofinder-muscle-run.log 2>&1 && test -s results/Results_*/Orthogroups/Orthogroups.tsv && test -s results/Results_*/Species_Tree/SpeciesTree_rooted.txt

upstream.name: OrthoFinder
upstream.citation: Emms and Kelly 2015; Emms and Kelly 2017; Emms and Kelly 2019; Emms and Kelly 2022; Emms et al. 2025
